summary: Iteration 15 - Admin Panel Template Management Bug Fix Testing Complete. All reported bugs have been fixed and verified: 1) Templates stat card on Overview tab is now clickable and navigates to Templates tab, 2) Category cards on Categories tab are now clickable and navigate to Templates tab filtered by that category, 3) Edit dialog opens correctly from Admin Panel with pre-filled name/description/category fields.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error with <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/templates returns list of templates
Backend: GET /api/templates with category_id filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/templates/{id} returns template with lists and cards
Backend: GET /api/templates/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{id} updates template name successfully
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{id} updates template description successfully
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{id} updates template category successfully
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{id} without auth returns 401
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{id} with empty body returns 400
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} without auth returns 401
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} deletes template successfully
Backend: GET /api/template-categories returns list of categories
Frontend: Admin Panel loads with 4 tabs (Overview, Users, Templates, Categories)
Frontend: Templates stat card on Overview tab is clickable
Frontend: Clicking Templates stat card navigates to Templates tab
Frontend: Templates tab shows table with name, category, creator, stats, actions columns
Frontend: Edit button (pencil icon) opens edit dialog
Frontend: Edit dialog has pre-filled name input
Frontend: Edit dialog has pre-filled description input
Frontend: Edit dialog has category dropdown
Frontend: Edit dialog Save Changes button sends PUT request
Frontend: Success toast 'Template updated!' shown after edit
Frontend: Template name updates in table after save
Frontend: Preview button (eye icon) opens preview dialog
Frontend: Preview dialog shows template structure with lists and cards
Frontend: Category filter dropdown is present on Templates tab
Frontend: Categories tab shows category cards
Frontend: Clicking category card navigates to Templates tab
Frontend: Templates are filtered by selected category after category card click
Frontend: 'Filtered by: [category name]' text shown when filtered
critical_code_review_comments: All reported bugs have been fixed and working correctly
Templates stat card has data-testid='admin-templates-stat-card' and onClick handler to setActiveTab('templates')
Category cards have data-testid='category-card-{id}' and onClick handler to filter and navigate
Edit dialog properly uses apiPut for PUT /api/templates/{id}
Delete uses window.confirm() for confirmation before apiDelete
Preview dialog fetches full template data including lists and cards
Minor: Console shows HTML hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue from React dev tools
seed_data_creation: None - used existing templates and categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all Admin Panel template management bug fixes: 1) Templates stat card clickable - navigates to Templates tab, 2) Category cards clickable - navigates to Templates tab with filter, 3) Edit dialog opens from pencil icon with pre-filled fields, 4) PUT /api/templates/{id} works for admin, 5) DELETE /api/templates/{id} works for admin. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_template_management.py. Admin Panel has 4 tabs: Overview, Users, Templates, Categories. Templates tab has table layout with eye/pencil/trash action buttons.

templates_stat_card_click.details: Clicking Templates stat card on Overview tab navigates to Templates tab via setActiveTab('templates')

category_card_click.details: Clicking category card on Categories tab sets templateFilter to category_id and navigates to Templates tab

edit_dialog.details: Edit button opens dialog with pre-filled name/description/category, Save sends PUT /api/templates/{id}, success toast shown

delete_template.details: Delete button shows window.confirm(), then sends DELETE /api/templates/{id}, template removed from table

preview_dialog.details: Preview button opens dialog showing template structure with lists (To Do, In Progress, Done) and cards

category_filter.details: Category filter dropdown on Templates tab filters templates by selected category

bugs_fixed_verification.bug: Clicking Templates stat card on Admin Overview does nothing
bugs_fixed_verification.verification: Templates stat card has onClick={() => setActiveTab('templates')} and data-testid='admin-templates-stat-card'

bugs_fixed_verification.bug: Clicking category cards on Categories tab does nothing
bugs_fixed_verification.verification: Category cards have onClick={() => { setTemplateFilter(category.category_id); setActiveTab('templates'); }}

bugs_fixed_verification.bug: Edit dialog not opening from Admin Panel
bugs_fixed_verification.verification: Edit button has onClick={() => handleEditTemplate(template)} which opens dialog with pre-filled fields
